01 / 04 · OWNER EDIT

Change a price in seconds.

Open your simple editor from any device and type the new price. No developer, ticket or delay.

✓ Designed phone-first ✓ Easy self-editing ✓ No page-builder bloat ✓ Personal support
A simpler way to get online

Built for how small business actually works.

You are busy serving customers, not managing software. I take care of the design and technical work, then give you an easy way to keep the everyday details current.

01 — TALK

Tell me what you do

Send your details, products and photos over WhatsApp. No long briefing document required.

02 — BUILD

I design and build it

You get a polished, fast website shaped around your business and your customers.

03 — RUN

You keep it current

Update the things that change often yourself. I am still here when you need bigger changes.

Live client website

Khaya Kos

Fresh food, updated for every market day.

A real business, not a mockup

Khaya Kos runs on exactly this.

The owner updates her menu, prices and availability herself, so customers always know what is actually available.

  • Products and prices stay current
  • Sold-out items can be marked instantly
  • The site feels great on a customer's phone
Visit the live website →

Ready for a website that keeps up?
